---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: [short description of the feature]"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: Losomon
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing. One paragraph max. -->

---

## Problem This Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who experiences it and how often? -->

**As a** [member / librarian / admin / visitor],  
**I want to** [do something],  
**so that** [I get this benefit].

---

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you'd like this to work. Be as specific as you can. -->

---

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered other ways to solve this problem? Why is your proposal better? -->

---

## Which User Role Benefits?

- [ ] Public visitors (books page)
- [ ] Members
- [ ] Librarians
- [ ] Administrators
- [ ] All roles

---

## UI Mockup / Sketch

<!-- If this involves a UI change, describe or sketch what it might look like. Attach images if you have them. -->

---

## Implementation Notes (optional)

<!-- If you have ideas about how this could be implemented technically, share them here. Not required. -->

---

## Priority / Impact

How important is this to you?

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — blocking my use of the system
- [ ] 🟡 High — significantly improves my workflow
- [ ] 🟢 Medium — nice to have
- [ ] ⚪ Low — minor improvement

---

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, related issues, or links that might help. -->
